name: Stir-Fried Tofu with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix tamari, brown rice syrup, and black pepper in a bowl and set aside.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a wok over high heat for 1 minute.
3. Stir-fry onions and garlic for 2 minutes.
4. Add carrots, bell peppers, and cauliflower. Stir-fry for 1 to 2 minutes.
5. If necessary, add a little water to prevent sticking.
6. Add broccoli and mushrooms. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Add peas, sprouts, and tofu. Stir-fry for another 1 minute.
8. Stir in the tamari mixture.
9. Reduce heat to medium and cook for an additional 2 minutes until vegetables are tender-crisp.
10. Serve hot over rice.
